channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Large armchair left on the pavement at 25 Prince George Road the item is currently obstructing the pavement., 29th April
item.description:
Large armchair left on the pavement at 25 Prince George Road the item is currently obstructing the pavement.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Prince George Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large dip o/s 110-120 Parkside Ave, B'Heath, 29th April
item.description:
Large dip o/s 110-120 Parkside Ave, B'Heath - man says that this has been dealt with recently by the council, but he feels this has made the matter worse. He says that cars driving over this area are banging their vehicles in the dip
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Parkside Avenue, Barnehurst, Erith, London Borough of Bexley
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street Light opposite no. 122 - not lit at night since 01/03/2026, 29th April
item.description:
Street Light opposite no. 122 - not lit at night, since 01/03/2026
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Glengall Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Illegal hmo, 29th April
item.description:
I have reported the issue with number 38,first avenue.da7 5sx's bins already and nothing is being done to resolve the issue.yet again the bin people have left their paper recycling bin as it still has bins bags hanging out of it as does their garden waste bin.please send someone round to sort this out.i also believe this is an illegal hmo as the current owners have gone abroad and put the house in the hands of a letting agency.there are atleast 7 people living in this property now and if not sorted soon the issue will get worse.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): First Avenue, West Heath, Bexleyheath, London Borough of Bexley
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Traffic Light stick on red for several sequences, 29th April
item.description:
The northbound traffic light on Royal College Street at the corner of Kentish Town Road is out of sequence. I noticed this yesterday and also this morning. The light is on red for several sequences. In the end, traffic is going through a red light.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 349, Royal College Street, Kentish Town, Camden Town, London Borough of Camden
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: House old goods, 29th April
item.description:
Rubbish dumped washing machine chest Of draws running machine box’s ect ect Side of number 11 Moye close

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Moye Close, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti on wall, 29th April
item.description:
Hi there, Please remove graffiti from the brick wall. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Geffrye Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti on garage, 29th April
item.description:
Tag on garage 46
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Thorburn Square, Old Kent Road, London Borough of Southwark
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Constant rubbish piling up, 29th April
item.description:
Photos taken on 22 April and 29 April. You can see the increase in amount. These are household rubbish and confirmed with business on street facing the pile that they have arranged ribbish to be collected on side street. This area is a black spot - something systemic is going wrong - recurring fly tipping, rubbish not cleared, wrong bin bags (clear bags for non-recycling items), not sufficient bin space for residents, the list goes on. The business suffer, pedestrians suffer (narrow path, rubbish disrupted by animals flying everywhere, causing hygienic issues) Please clear the area and I believe a combination of deterrent, education, reconsidering the set up for rubbish disposal of the area is needed for the benefit for the neighbourhood.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Woolwich Road, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: More rubbish dumped, 29th April
item.description:
Rubbish dumped here yet again. Many boxes and plastic.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Ripon Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tyre dumped, 29th April
item.description:
Another tyre fly tipped in west hallowes

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): West Hallowes, Eltham

item.title: Dropped two vats of poisonous material, 29th April
item.description:
A guy in a van dropped two big vats of poisonous liquid . I have the reg and a photo of the van
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Westcombe Hill, Blackheath
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned vehicle, 29th April
item.description:
Registration number does not match registered vehicle. Registered a Honda Jazz Grey. This is a white Peugeot 208. Maybe stolen.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Woodhurst Road, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Your repair report 9355270, 29th April
item.description:
Previously reported issue where car came up on the pavement and damaged the concrete at the rear of our garden. You have swept up the loose concrete but the concrete itself needs repairing - this is owned by you - not us. Please complete the job by replacing the damaged concrete.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Rectory Lane, Albany Park, Sidcup, London Borough of Bexley
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Single mattress fly tipped in westerham drive, 29th April
item.description:
There is a single mattress to the entrance of the flats in westerham drive, this has been there around 6 weeks. Can this please be removed.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Westerham Drive, Blendon, London Borough of Bexley
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 98, Avenue Road, Penge, City of London

item.title: Broken down bed, 29th April
item.description:
This Broken down bed has been here for 2 weeks and not collected by dustmen nor recycle binmen. can be hazardous if it falls over, or people use the metal fixing poles as weapons.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 31, The Cut, Waterloo, London Borough of Southwark
Report on FixMyStreet

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 31, Widmore Road, Plaistow, Bromley, London Borough of Bromley
